title: Cosmos Remix — Confetti you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable falling-confetti particle field: each piece drifts down at its own seeded rate with a horizontal sway and its own spin, so leaf/ruby/star shapes tumble as they fall and the vertical phase wraps for a seamless loop. Live glass panel: palette/shape/density/speed/size + a Flutter knob driving sway and tumble. Reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot, raise Flutter to make pieces sway wider and tumble faster, and pick a shape (defaults to leaf for tumbling pieces; ruby/star also tumble well). KEY TECHNIQUES: confetti geometry — a per-particle hash seeds each piece's column, fall rate and spin; the vertical phase is taken mod 1 so pieces leaving the bottom re-enter at the top, and all fall/sway/spin cycle counts are integers over the loop so frame(0)===frame(LOOP); the spin angle is passed straight to drawShape so the chosen glyph rotates as it falls. PARAMS convention: window.__params describes the knobs and window.setParam(key,value) applies them for a generic auto-built panel; theme tokens are a PALETTES map driving a CSS accent var and the per-particle colour ramp; SHAPES are cheap canvas glyphs drawn additively. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Density for a thicker snowfall, Flutter for livelier tumbling, switch shape to ruby/star, add palettes to PALETTES.
